query:
SELECT 
  number, numberDisplay, providerServiceCode, customerName, serviceExternalId, servicePlanName, customerId
FROM phone_numbers
WHERE provider = 'ChannelHaus'
ORDER BY providerServiceCode
LIMIT 30;
